Bestiary-Engine · Creatures Generation v1
A structured, controllable image benchmark defined by an explicit causal visual grammar. Each creature is deterministically generated from a 9-dimensional WorldState (Flux → Hunyuan3D → pyrender); every attribute is a ground-truth label. The benchmark enables systematic study of representation learning, neuro-symbolic, and causal methods under a single controllable data source.
Batch: creatures_generation_v1 Total creatures: 1440 Shown here: 24 Attribute dims: 9 Pipeline: Flux 2D → 3D assembly → pyrender

📐 Explicit Visual Grammar

Every creature is deterministically generated from the values of these 9 dimensions; each value serves as ground-truth label. The Flux prompt is derived directly from the WorldState.

🦴 Topology topology 6
humanoid quadruped winged_biped serpentine hex headless
🎨 Style style 4
robot insect organic mech
🌈 Palette palette 5
warm_red_orange cool_blue_cyan neutral_gray vivid_saturated dark_muted
🧍 Pose pose 9
standing_neutral alert_ready crouching_low coiled_sinuous slithering_flat rearing_up floating_hover suspended_vertical resting_flat
🦋 Wings has_wings
no yes
🦎 Tail has_tail
no yes
🦄 Horns has_horns
no yes
💪 #Arms n_arms
0 2
🦵 #Legs n_legs
0 2 4 6

🔍 Filter by dimension

Click a chip to filter; click again (or "clear") to remove. Multiple dimensions stack with AND semantics.

🦴 Topology
🎨 Style
🌈 Palette
🧍 Pose
🦋 Wings
🦎 Tail
🦄 Horns
💪 #Arms
🦵 #Legs

🖼️ Sample gallery

Each card: left = Flux 2D (prompt derived from WorldState), right = 3D assembled pyrender, bottom = 9-dim ground-truth attributes.
